expectations.note: B-foreign rules_foreign_cc cmake wrapping: zlib's own tests (test/example.c, test/infcover.c, test/minigzip.c) are driven via the upstream CMake/CTest harness and are not wired as Bazel test targets in this approach's BUILD.bazel. There is no native Bazel test target in scope, so honest expectations cap at tier-3 (the wrapping cmake target builds and produces libz.a). This step is informational only.
